name_en: 720 Grey Hand-Rubbed Leather with Gold Buckle·Accordion Bag 22cm
name_cn:
720 Grey Hand-Rubbed Leather with Gold Buckle·Accordion Bag 22cm
The most elegant Sac de jour series, a timeless classic. Exquisite toothpick-textured calfskin with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious! The shoulder strap is adjustable for your preferred length. The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the style of understated luxury~
Model: 717440
Dimensions: 22x18x10.5cm
